case_title: CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED VS. ROBERT NEWMAN et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE VACATING JUDGMENT AND PERMITTING ENTRY OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED
